answers.text: 当前围绕 Transfer Pump (pump-14)、Trim Heater (heater-14) 及其关联流股 feed-93、pump-outlet-93、heater-outlet-93 生成候选编辑提案。诊断显示三项错误：heater-outlet-93 未连接下游、feed-93 缺少流量规格、pump-14 出口压力目标低于进口压力；两项警告：pump-14 效率超出推荐范围、heater-14 出口状态在下游恢复前可能漂移。本次提案覆盖所有三项错误和 pump-14 的参数警告，heater-14 的警告属于信息性提示，暂不生成 patch。由于 heater-outlet-93 的下游连接目标在当前 flowsheet 中不存在，该条 patch 仅放置占位符，标记为 partial。

proposed_actions.title: 为 heater-outlet-93 添加下游连接占位符
proposed_actions.rationale: heater-outlet-93 当前 source_unit_id 为 heater-14，但缺少 target_unit_id，导致 STREAM_DISCONNECTED 错误和 solver invalid_topology。此 patch 插入一个 connection_placeholder，提示用户指定下游单元。由于当前 flowsheet 中不存在可确定的下游目标，仅放置占位符而非实际重连。

proposed_actions.title: 为 feed-93 补全流量规格占位符
proposed_actions.rationale: feed-93 当前仅有 pressure_kpa 和 temperature_c，缺少 flow_rate 规格，触发 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 错误。此 patch 在 specs 中插入 flow_rate 占位符，等待用户填入实际值。

proposed_actions.title: 修正 pump-14 出口压力目标至高于进口压力
proposed_actions.rationale: pump-14 当前 outlet_pressure_target_kpa=170，而进口流股 feed-93 的 pressure_kpa=210，出口目标低于进口，物理上不合理。建议将 outlet_pressure_target_kpa 上调至 350 kPa（进口压力的约 1.67 倍，属于常见离心泵升压比），用户可根据实际工艺需求调整。同时 pump-outlet-93 的 pressure_kpa 当前为 178，也应随之更新以保持一致性，但该值最终应由求解器重新计算，此处仅标记为待更新。

issues.message: Trim Heater Outlet 93 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Transfer Pump Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Transfer Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Transfer Pump efficiency_percent=54 is outside the recommended operating range.
Trim Heater outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the heater should remain explanatory context only.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_DISCONNECTED
citations.excerpt: Trim Heater Outlet 93 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Transfer Pump Feed is missing flow rate specification.

citations.label: 诊断 PUMP_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_INVALID
citations.excerpt: Transfer Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.

citations.label: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE
citations.excerpt: Transfer Pump efficiency_percent=54 is outside the recommended operating range.

citations.label: 诊断 HEATER_OUTLET_STATE_DEPENDENT
citations.excerpt: Trim Heater outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the heater should remain explanatory context only.
